rationale: Fresh task-close validation from repo truth passes. Initial git status --short was clean before validation reads; codewiki_state(refresh=true, taskId=TASK-086) reported health green and TASK-086 acceptance. TASK-086 implementation builds cover public codewiki_artifact_status API/tool/docs, /wiki-resume artifact-status scheduling, legacy codewiki_claim compatibility alias, and session-handoff boundary fix. Commits 30448c9 and 16f3b18 contain implementation plus graph refresh. HEAD 16f3b1810573b1a797196f223a2320bd4ea11db5 was clean immediately before writing this report with tree 6c53ab1b0cd9ae116fe1fe80286e873424004bee. Acceptance evidence: README exposes codewiki_artifact_status and marks codewiki_claim as legacy alias; src/adapters/pi/index.ts registers codewiki_claim as deprecated compatibility alias for codewiki_artifact_status; src/adapters/pi/commands/resume.ts selects/blocks tasks from artifact_statuses and reports conflicts/holders/waiters; src/adapters/pi/tools/session-handoff.ts stages tool-context new-session handoffs and uses ctx.newSession only in /wiki-session-handoff command context; tests/smoke/package-smoke.test.mjs, resume-scheduler.test.mjs, and session-handoff.test.mjs cover tool/API, alias, scheduler, and handoff behavior. Prior implementation validation .codewiki/validation/2026-05-16-implementation-pass-task-086.json passed. Fresh required audits passed: alignment, changed, task, generated-parity.
